title: Powerhouse Organization Identity
content: Powerhouse is a Scalable Network Organization (SNO) building open-source, local-first, decentralized operations tooling for open organizations (originally focused on DAOs). The current tagline is "Power, Reclaimed." The mission is to coordinate people, code, and capital across open networks. The organization operates as a parent brand encompassing multiple sub-brands and products, each addressing a different layer of the decentralized operations stack. The visual identity is dark-first with a cyan-to-purple gradient accent, reflecting the technical and infrastructure-oriented nature of the organization. Source: brand analysis in the design systems repository at https://github.com/powerhouse-inc/design-systems/blob/main/context/brand-analysis.md.
description: Powerhouse is a Scalable Network Organization (SNO) coordinating people, code, and capital across open networks.
